name: Hard Money Lender - New York #1 NYC Manhattan Bridge Capital Fix Flip Loans, Real Estate Loans, Bridge Loans
description_short: Manhattan Bridge Capital is a NASDAQ-listed hard money lender specializing in short-term, secured loans for real estate investors across NY, NJ, CT, and FL, with focus on fix-and-flip and bridge financing.
description_long:
Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOAN) is a hard money lender that has positioned itself as a leading provider of non-traditional financing to professional real estate investors in the New York metropolitan area and beyond. The company was established to fill a gap in real estate financing by offering short-term, secured loans when traditional banking channels are unavailable or impractical for time-sensitive property transactions.

The company offers three primary loan products: fix-and-flip loans for properties purchased and repaired for quick resale, bridge loans for acquiring small income-producing properties, and construction financing for small, new development projects. Their lending footprint covers all five NYC boroughs (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island), Long Island (Nassau and Suffolk Counties), Hudson Valley, Rockland, and Westchester Counties, with loan proceeds used to fund acquisitions in New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, and Florida. Loans are typically structured as one-year terms with interest-only payments during the loan period and a balloon payment at maturity.

Manhattan Bridge Capital distinguishes itself through its public company status on NASDAQ, which provides regulatory oversight and transparency compared to many private hard money lenders. The company focuses exclusively on professional real estate investors rather than retail consumers, indicating specialization and risk management through borrower vetting. Their loans are secured by real estate collateral and typically require personal guarantees from business principals, representing a conservative underwriting approach.

Prospective borrowers should understand that hard money loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional mortgages, with pricing driven by short-term structure and private lending risk premiums. The one-year term requirement and balloon payment structure demand detailed exit strategies. While the website emphasizes serving real estate professionals, the actual loan approval rates, typical pricing, and specific qualification criteria are not disclosed, requiring direct application for concrete terms.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NASDAQ-listed public company (ticker: LOAN) providing regulatory oversight and transparency
Serves entire NYC metro region across all 5 boroughs plus tri-state area (Nassau, Suffolk, Hudson Valley, Westchester, Rockland)
Specializes in time-sensitive real estate transactions where traditional banks cannot move quickly
Secured loan structure with real estate collateral reduces lender risk
Explicit focus on professional real estate investors indicates sophisticated underwriting
Offers multiple loan products (fix-flip, bridge, construction) rather than single product
Loans fund acquisitions across multiple states (NY, NJ, CT, FL) providing geographic flexibility
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan costs, making price comparison impossible
No information provided on minimum/maximum loan amounts, loan-to-value ratios, or qualification criteria
One-year loan term with balloon payment structure creates refinancing risk and requires strong exit strategy
Requires personal guarantees from business principals, creating personal liability exposure
Target market limited to professional real estate investors; not accessible to individual homebuyers or small business owners
best_for: Professional real estate investors executing fix-and-flip projects in NY tri-state area
Real estate developers needing bridge financing between property acquisition and income generation
Small construction companies financing new development projects requiring short-term capital
diagnosis: Manhattan Bridge Capital is best suited for professional real estate investors with established track records who need fast, short-term financing for time-sensitive property deals across the Northeast and Florida. The primary caveat is that hard money loans carry significantly higher costs than traditional mortgages, require personal liability, and demand a clear one-year exit strategy—borrowers must contact directly for pricing, as no rates or fees are disclosed on the website.
services: Fix-and-flip loans for purchase and repair of properties for quick resale
Bridge loans for small income-producing property acquisitions
Construction financing for small new development projects
Short-term secured real estate loans (typically one-year terms)
Loans secured by real estate collateral
Interest-only payment structures during loan term
Balloon payment financing at loan maturity
Multi-state lending across NY, NJ, CT, and Florida
Financing for acquisitions across NYC boroughs and surrounding counties
Loans requiring personal guarantees from business principals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 60 Cutter Mill Rd #205, Great Neck, NY 11021
